tasks.label: Build mapping
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && colcon build --symlink-install --base-paths . sllidar_ros2 ros2_laser_scan_merger

tasks.label: Run sensors launch
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch map_generator sensors.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB0 right_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB1 arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair

tasks.label: Run mapping launch
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch map_generator mapping.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB0 right_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB1 arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair

tasks.label: Run mapping launch without RViz
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch map_generator mapping.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB0 right_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB1 arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair use_rviz:=false

tasks.label: Run mapping launch and auto save map
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch map_generator mapping.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB0 right_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB1 arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair auto_save_map:=true auto_save_delay:=5.0 save_map:="${workspaceFolder}/Other-Files/GeneralData/Maps/test_map"

tasks.label: Save map manually
args: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && ros2 run nav2_map_server map_saver_cli -f "${workspaceFolder}/Other-Files/GeneralData/Maps/test_map"

tasks.label: Build mapping_test
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && colcon build --packages-select mapping_test --build-base build --install-base install

tasks.label: Run mapping_test
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch mapping_test mapping_test.launch.py

tasks.label: Run mapping_test without RViz
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch mapping_test mapping_test.launch.py use_rviz:=false

tasks.label: Build localization_test
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/Localization/LocalizationTest" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest/install/setup.bash" && colcon build --packages-select localization_test --build-base build --install-base install

tasks.label: Run localization_test
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/Localization/LocalizationTest" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest/install/setup.bash" && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch localization_test localization_test.launch.py

tasks.label: Run localization_test without RViz
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/Localization/LocalizationTest" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest/install/setup.bash" && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch localization_test localization_test.launch.py use_rviz:=false

tasks.label: Build navigation_test
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/NavigationTest" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest/install/setup.bash" && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/Localization/LocalizationTest/install/setup.bash" && colcon build --packages-select navigation_test --build-base build --install-base install

tasks.label: Run navigation_test
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/NavigationTest" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest/install/setup.bash" && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/Localization/LocalizationTest/install/setup.bash" && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch navigation_test navigation_test.launch.py

tasks.label: Run navigation_test without RViz
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/NavigationTest" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest/install/setup.bash" && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/Localization/LocalizationTest/install/setup.bash" && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch navigation_test navigation_test.launch.py use_rviz:=false

tasks.label: Build all test packages
args: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest" && colcon build --packages-select mapping_test --build-base build --install-base install && source install/setup.bash && cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/Localization/LocalizationTest" && colcon build --packages-select localization_test --build-base build --install-base install && source install/setup.bash && cd "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/NavigationTest" && colcon build --packages-select navigation_test --build-base build --install-base install

tasks.label: USBIPD Attach Wheelchair Devices
args: usbipd attach --wsl --busid 1-1; usbipd attach --wsl --busid 1-3; usbipd attach --wsl --busid 1-4

tasks.label: Build localization
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/Localization/Localization" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && colcon build --symlink-install --packages-select localization

tasks.label: Run localization launch
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/Localization/Localization" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch localization localization.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/left_lidar right_lidar_port:=/dev/right_lidar arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair

tasks.label: Build navigation
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/Navigation" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/Localization/Localization/install/setup.bash" && colcon build --symlink-install --packages-select navigation

tasks.label: Clean and Build localization and navigation
Run navigation launch
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/Navigation" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/Localization/Localization/install/setup.bash" && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch navigation navigation.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/left_lidar right_lidar_port:=/dev/right_lidar arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair

tasks.label: Run navigation launch without RViz
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/Navigation" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/Localization/Localization/install/setup.bash" && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch navigation navigation.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/left_lidar right_lidar_port:=/dev/right_lidar arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair use_rviz:=false

tasks.label: Build navigation with mapping
args: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping" && colcon build --symlink-install && source install/setup.bash && cd "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/Navigation" && colcon build --symlink-install

tasks.label: Build navigation mapping only
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/Navigation" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && colcon build --symlink-install --packages-select navigation

tasks.label: Run navigation while mapping
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/Navigation" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch navigation navigation_mapping.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/left_lidar right_lidar_port:=/dev/right_lidar arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair use_rviz:=true

tasks.label: Run navigation while mapping without RViz
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/Navigation" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch navigation navigation_mapping.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/left_lidar right_lidar_port:=/dev/right_lidar arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair use_rviz:=false

tasks.label: Run navigation while mapping and auto save map
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Navigation/Pathfinding/Navigation" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch navigation navigation_mapping.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/left_lidar right_lidar_port:=/dev/right_lidar arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair use_rviz:=true auto_save_map:=true auto_save_period:=30.0 save_map:="${workspaceFolder}/Other-Files/GeneralData/Maps/live_nav_map"

tasks.label: Save live navigation mapping map manually
args: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && ros2 run nav2_map_server map_saver_cli -f "${workspaceFolder}/Other-Files/GeneralData/Maps/live_nav_map" --ros-args -p map_subscribe_transient_local:=true

tasks.label: Run localization launch without RViz
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/Localization/Localization" && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source "${workspaceFolder}/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash" && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch localization localization.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/left_lidar right_lidar_port:=/dev/right_lidar arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair use_rviz:=false
